---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
data <- read.csv("data/q1_data.csv")
```

```{r}
mean(data$Ozone, na.rm = TRUE)
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(data$Ozone))
```

```{r}
aggregate(Temp ~ Month, data, mean)
```

```{r}
data %>% drop_na() %>% group_by(Month) %>% summarise(max_Ozone = max(Ozone)) %>% arrange(desc(max_Ozone)) %>% head(1)
```

```{r}
clean_data <- na.omit(data)
cor(clean_data$Ozone, clean_data$Temp)
```

```{r}
sum(complete.cases(data))
```

```{r}
nrow(data)
```

```{r}
data %>% filter(Temp >80) %>% summarise(mean_ozone = mean(Ozone, na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
clean_data %>% select(Ozone, Solar.R, Temp, Wind) %>% cor(use = "complete.obs")
```

```{r}
rbind(c(1,3,5), c(3,2,10))
```
